description: As the Logistics Operations Manager for Capital Bikeshare, analyze peak weekend trip data from ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/cabi_weekend_trips.csv and ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/station_directory.csv to schedule overnight rebalancing vans. Create a rebalancing plan in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/cabi_rebalancing_plan.xlsx that calculates the total Departures, total Arrivals, and Net Fleet Change (Arrivals minus Departures) for each station using dynamic formulas or Pivot Tables. The final workbook must include an 'Executive Summary' identifying the Top 5 Surplus Stations (highest positive Net Fleet Change) and the Top 5 Deficit Stations (lowest negative Net Fleet Change).

metadata.data_source: Modeled after Capital Bikeshare open data system
